description: This bag from fabindia references authentic Indian style with its materials and design details. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look when you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for a great Indo-Western fusion.Base diameter: 15 cmHeight: 17 cmCrochet upper, potli-style purse with drawstringsBeaded handleFabric innerCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
